reports.title: GitHub Pages deploy failed: Pages not enabled
reports.error: Get Pages site failed. Please verify that the repository has Pages enabled and configured to build using GitHub Actions.
reports.rootCause: Pages had not been enabled; a one-time repo setting no workflow token can set.

reports.title: Pages site cannot be created by Actions token (private repo)
reports.error: Create Pages site failed. Error: Resource not accessible by integration.
reports.rootCause: Pages on a private repo requires a paid plan; the Actions GITHUB_TOKEN cannot create the site. Platform limitation.

reports.title: Workflow startup failure from environment protection
reports.error: Startup failure: job rejected before running (no runner, no steps) due to github-pages environment branch restriction.
reports.rootCause: Auto-created github-pages environment restricted deploys to the default branch; the job was tied to that environment.

reports.title: Merge conflict from squash-merge divergence
reports.rootCause: Earlier squash-merges diverged branch history from main; resolved by merging main back in.
